title: AdaptiveView
description: Mod for dynamically adjusting the servers view distance based on performance.
body: # AdaptiveView by TreSet ## Description A server side fabric mod that dynamically adjusts the server's View- and Simulation-Distance based on performance. The mod provides a highly customizable system for dynamically adjusting the View- and Simulation-Distance of servers based on multiple real time parameters. It also includes a powerfull locking and unlocking system, allowing for smooth operation of View-Distance sensitive contraptions. ## Enjoying this mod? Consider checking out [TreeLauncher](https://treelauncher.net/), the component based Minecraft Launcher. ## Setup Download the latest version in [releases](https://modrinth.com/mod/adaptiveview/versions) and place it into your fabric server's mods directory. You also need to install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions) with this mod. ## List of Features - Dynamic adjustment of the View- and Simulation-Distance based of MSPT, Memory usage and online Players - Highly customizable configuration [learn more...](https://github.com/Tre5et/adaptiveview/blob/1.21/config.md) - Ingame commands to change everything [learn more...](https://github.com/Tre5et/adaptiveview/blob/1.21/commands.md) - An advanced view distance locking system including support for automated unlocking [learn more...](https://github.com/Tre5et/adaptiveview/blob/1.21/commands.md#lock) ## License This mod is available under the GNU GPLv3 license. Feel free to redistribute, modify and incorporate it in your own open-source projects.
